project_context.domain: Solar Energy Consultancy & Government Subsidy Scheme
project_context.archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority, Clarity, Truth) adapted for Green Energy

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight text-blue-900

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50
header.elements: Logo, Navigation links, Language Switcher (EN/HI), Primary CTA (Apply Now)

hero.style: relative flex flex-col lg:flex-row items-center gap-12 py-20 bg-slate-50 overflow-hidden
hero.instructions: Left: Headline, Sub-headline, Dual CTAs. Right: 3D Solar Illustration or high-quality photo with floating benefit badges. Use eco-tech background for subtle texture.

subsidy_grid.style: Bento Grid (3 equal columns on desktop)
subsidy_grid.card_style: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm border border-slate-100 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
subsidy_grid.instructions: Each card represents a KW tier (1KW, 2KW, 3KW+). Highlight the subsidy amount in massive text (e.g. text-5xl font-black text-emerald-600).

key_features.instructions: Use lucide-react icons (Sun, ShieldCheck, Banknotes, Wrench).

partners_marquee.instructions: Use react-fast-marquee. Since actual logos are unavailable, use lucide-react icons paired with text (e.g. <Zap/> Tata Power, <Sun/> Adani Solar, <Landmark/> SBI, PNB, BoB) formatted beautifully.

lead_generation_form.style: bg-white p-8 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-100 relative z-10
lead_generation_form.instructions: Fields: Name, Phone, Monthly Bill. Use Shadcn UI Input and Button components. Button should be massive and highly converting (bg-emerald-600).

images.description: 3D illustration of a sleek solar panel harnessing energy, floating on clean white background.
Abstract eco-friendly green and corporate blue gradient, subtle technological grid lines.
A building with solar panels on the roof.
Family wearing traditional Indian clothing enjoys relaxation time on sofa.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons must have transform scale (hover:scale-105) and active state (active:scale-95). Links must have underline animation or color transition.
interactions_and_motion.scroll_effects: Use framer-motion for simple fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on scroll for all major sections.
interactions_and_motion.marquee: Slow, continuous drift for the partners section using react-fast-marquee.

technical_rules.accessibility: Ensure text contrast on hero buttons. Include aria-labels for the language switcher and icons.
technical_rules.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a fully responsive landing page using Tailwind CSS and the provided components. The tone is authoritative yet approachable (government scheme + eco-friendly). The layout should heavily feature generous padding and stark contrast between the Corporate Blue headings and the white/slate-50 backgrounds. Use the provided 3D illustration in the hero section for a premium tech-forward feel. The partners section MUST use react-fast-marquee with lucide-react icons + text for the brands since logos are unavailable. Ensure the lead generation form is highly visible, placed either in the hero section or immediately after the Subsidy Grid.
